# Haiku Test Instructions

Your ONLY task is to reply to this issue with a haiku based on the issue title and body.

## Rules

1. Read the issue title and body.
2. Write a haiku (5-7-5 syllable structure) that is thematically related to the issue content (e.g., Kubernetes pods crashing at 3am).
3. Post the haiku as a comment in this exact format:

🎋 **Haiku Triage**

<line 1>
<line 2>
<line 3>

---
_This haiku was generated by Copilot as a test of custom instructions._

4. Do NOT output anything else. Just the formatted haiku.
